case_title: RICHARD FRANK VS. J.P. MORGAN CHASE BANK ET AL

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRANK, RICHARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST J.P. MORGAN CHASE BANK IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS ALREADY ADJUDICATION IN CSM-14-848110 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER -DENIED.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-25-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-25-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAYS INC. WAS PRESENT BY COURT CALL EXCEPT DEFENDANT J.P. MORGAN CHASE BANK WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AT TODAYS HEARING. DEFENDANT JYUNG KIM INFORMED THE COURT THAT SHE REPRESENTS DEFENDANTS BRITISH AIRWAYS INC. AND J.P. MORGAN CHASE BANK AT TODAYS HEARING, SHE FURTHER STATED THAT SHE WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT FOR BOTH DEFENDANTS. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-25-2015 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRANK, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY FRANK, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT J.P. MORGAN CHASE BANK BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-25-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRANK, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT J.P. MORGAN CHASE BANK BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRANK, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT J.P. MORGAN CHASE BANK
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO J.P. MORGAN CHASE BANK BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUN-25-2015 AT 1:30 PM.
ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE = GRANTED
DECLARATION RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAYS PLC
